name: Lemony Garbanzo Bean Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups canned chick-peas, drained and rinsed (discard any loose skins)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the drained beans in the work bowl of a food processor and puree.
2. Add the eggs, sugar, baking powder, and lemon zest to the puree, and pulse until combined.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Grease a 9-inch cake pan with butter or cooking spray. Line the bottom of the pan with wax paper, place it in the pan, and coat the top of the paper.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Set the cake on a wire rack to cool for 15 minutes. Remove the cake from the pan and let it cool to room temperature.
8. Before serving, squeeze lemon juice over the cake and sprinkle generously with confectioners' sugar.
